title: ENC 1101 & 1102 Ideas
content:
ENC 1101 & 1102 Ideas

Unpack Readings
  1. Identify the author’s thesis, quote it below, and restate it in your own words.
  2. What are the author’s main points used throughout the essay to support the thesis? Are they effective, and why or why not?

Joining The Conversation responses must be answered thoughtfully and in complete sentences. To receive full credit, your answers should be ~5-10 sentences and be complete thoughts that could stand independent of the text or accompanying question. Please submit as a PDF file in MLA format.


Final Drafts require revision notes.

All Assignment drop one letter grade per class late

I will not accept an essay if you do not do peer review.

Attendance is not just showing up, but also Participation. In order to receive all credit for attending, you need to show up to class on time, have completed the readings/assignments beforehand, and at least make one contribution in class.
